text:
VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by calculating the covered charges from all claim records included in the stay (i.e., 
subtracted the revenue center non-covered charge amount from the revenue center total charge 
amount for revenue center code = 0001 that is reported on the claims that comprise the stay; sum the 
results for all claims for the stay). 

The exception to this formula is if there exists an erroneous condition relative to revenue center code 
0001, the calculation will
